articles.title: 🎉 Welcome to PromoHub — Your Automated Deal Finder!
articles.summary: This is your first auto-generated post. The site is now live and ready to publish fresh content every 4 hours. Soon you'll see real deals, product launches, and discoveries appearing here automatically. Bookmark this page and check back often for the best picks!

articles.title: ⚙️ How This Site Works (100% Free, 100% Automated)
articles.summary: This entire website runs for $0/month. GitHub Actions fetches RSS feeds every 4 hours, generates post pages, and commits them back. GitHub Pages serves the static files for free. No servers, no databases, no hosting fees. Just free tools doing amazing work.
